response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional depth in software engineering with 34 years of experience far exceeding the 15-year requirement, proven entrepreneurial leadership through GISCollective and multiple startups, and strong full-stack technical capability. However, the role is specifically for AI Strategy specialization, and the resume shows minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise—the recent MCP work at re:cinq suggests emerging interest but not the recognized expertise or demonstrated AI products the role requires. The lack of advanced degree in AI is an additional gap for a director-level AI strategy position.
strengths: 34 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems—significantly exceeds 15-year requirement
Proven entrepreneurial background as founder of GISCollective (since 2002) and senior roles at multiple startups; demonstrates ability to drive technical innovation
Full-stack technical fluency spanning multiple languages, platforms, and infrastructure work (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, Node.js, TypeScript); natural builder and architect
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products/platforms—critical gap for a specialized AI Strategy role; recent MCP work is encouraging but unproven at scale
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; no AI certifications or formal training mentioned despite role preference for advanced degree in AI
Cloud expertise appears limited to tactical implementations (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than strategic cloud platform vision or deep cloud architecture experience
